introduction: Running Time18 min 40 sAn engaging story of young enterprise, pitfalls, and eventual success that all young viewers will enjoy. It is about two young Greek boys in Montréal who try to earn some extra money for a trip to their sunny homeland by delivering pizzas. The misadventures they encounter and how they surmount them make an amusing story, full of youthful initiative.19 min2个小男孩生活在寒冷的地方，为了能够去温暖，美丽的远方去度假，去快递PIZZA赚钱的故事。CCTV-6 2006年12月
